name: davidwyly/rxn-orm
description: Lightweight ORM for PHP 8.2+: fluent SQL builder, PDO connection wrapper with nested transactions, hydrating active records with eager loading and casts. ~3k lines, zero runtime deps beyond ext-pdo.

suggest.davidwyly/rxn: ^0.1 — install when using `Rxn\Orm\Resource\RxnOrmCrudHandler`. The handler implements the framework's `Rxn\Framework\Http\Resource\CrudHandler` interface; rxn-orm's runtime stays standalone (zero deps beyond ext-pdo) for apps using just the SQL builder.
suggest.illuminate/database: Install for the benchmark suite to compare against Eloquent
suggest.doctrine/orm: Install for the benchmark suite to compare against Doctrine ORM
